insights: The total revenue of 8,278,519.42 was generated from 401,604 transactions, averaging 20.61 revenue per transaction.
The top product, WHITE HANGING HEART T-LIGHT HOLDER, accounted for 2065 sales, which corresponds to approximately 0.51% of all sales.
Revenue from the United Kingdom accounted for 356,728 out of 401,604 transactions, representing 88.78% of total sales.
recommendations: Focus marketing efforts on the top-selling product, the WHITE HANGING HEART T-LIGHT HOLDER, to further boost sales.
Enhance customer engagement in the United Kingdom, where the majority of sales originate, to increase retention and attract new customers.
Monitor anomalies in the sales dataset, such as the outlier negative sales of -168,469.60, to ensure data integrity and investigate underlying causes.
